steps.action: Create tension with mutations (reality and desire updates)
steps.expected: Tension has history for dynamics computation

steps.action: Run 'werk show <id>' on tension with history
steps.expected: Show displays dynamics summary section with phase, magnitude, conflict, movement
steps.observed: Dynamics section displayed: Phase: Assimilation, Magnitude: 0.52, Conflict: None, Movement: → Advancing

evidence.stdout:
Tension 01KJJPD21GK35ST8PH82SMT1QA

  Actual:     Three chapters drafted
  Status:     Active

  Mutations:  4
  Children:   2

Dynamics:
  Phase:      Assimilation (mutations: 3, convergence: 48%)
  Magnitude:  0.52
  Conflict:   None
  Movement:   → Advancing

steps.action: Run 'werk show <id> --verbose' on tension with history
steps.expected: Show displays all 10 dynamics with values or 'None'
steps.observed: All 10 dynamics displayed: StructuralTension, StructuralConflict, Oscillation, Resolution, CreativeCyclePhase, Orientation, CompensatingStrategy, StructuralTendency, AssimilationDepth, Neglect

evidence.stdout:

steps.observed: Mutation History section displayed with 4 mutations in chronological order (oldest first)

steps.expected: Show displays children section with child info

assertions.title: Dynamics on new tension without mutations

steps.action: Create fresh tension with no updates

steps.expected: Show displays Germination phase, no panic or error
steps.observed: Phase: Germination displayed correctly with no errors or panics
